## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Linked issue
- Required: `Closes #<issue>`
- Closes #

## Skill impact
- Trigger phrases / intended usage:
- User-facing behavior changes:

## Safety considerations
- Any risky behavior or external side effects?
- Any data/privacy concerns?

## Validation
- How this was tested:
- Example command(s) run:

## Rollback plan
- How to revert quickly if needed:

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue-first flow followed
- [ ] Branch from fork used
- [ ] No direct push to org default branch
- [ ] Docs/examples updated if behavior changed
